title: KosmoOrbit Runtime Adapter Contract
summary: Static contract for future local KosmoZentrale adapters. It defines adapter lanes, required evidence, human gates and blocked side effects without launching tools, starting models, reading sensors, scanning files, writing user data, uploading, publishing, touching external accounts or spending money.

adapter_lanes.label: Health Telemetry Adapter
adapter_lanes.future_capability: Read local hardware, model, storage, connector and queue status.
adapter_lanes.today_contract: Only the static Health Readiness JSON is rendered.

adapter_lanes.label: Local Kosmo Model Adapter
adapter_lanes.future_capability: Start, stop, observe and repair the local AI model.
adapter_lanes.today_contract: Kosmo is visible as product role only; no model process exists.

adapter_lanes.label: Tool Launch Adapter
adapter_lanes.future_capability: Open Blender, KosmoDesign, Draw, Viz, Prepare and Publish tools locally.
adapter_lanes.today_contract: Tools are listed in the Tool Registry only.

adapter_lanes.label: Job Queue Adapter
adapter_lanes.future_capability: Queue analysis, render, plan, export and repair jobs.
adapter_lanes.today_contract: Jobs are named in runtime copy only; no queue is created.
adapter_lanes.human_gate: Owner Freigabe fuer Kosten und Queue

adapter_lanes.label: Audit Log Adapter
adapter_lanes.future_capability: Persist command intent, evidence, gate, outcome and rollback metadata.

adapter_lanes.label: Publish / External Sync Adapter
adapter_lanes.future_capability: Create delivery packages, external sync and public release workflows.
adapter_lanes.today_contract: Publish and external sync stay blocked in command and risk contracts.

promotion_requirements: Command audit log with rollback metadata
Manual kill switch for every executable adapter
next_actions: Use this as the bridge between the visible Tool Registry and any future local KosmoZentrale runtime.
Do not implement executable adapters until schemas, gates, audit retention, rollback and kill switch behavior are approved.
Keep the current public repo in static review-only mode.
